report.summary: Sixth standup Apr 2: 42 learn pages (+4 since v5), 30,404 total lines (+13.2%). New: BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Portfolio Rebalancing guides. Build-v8 + Design + Publish + EOD-v4 ran since last standup. Publish queue emptied (4 promoted). 88 uncommitted files (+8). Day 11 deploy gap persists.

sections.title: Analytics
items: DELTA SINCE LAST STANDUP (v5): 4 new learn pages detected — total now 42 (up from 38). New: BTCfi Bitcoin DeFi Guide (1,099 lines), Crypto Portfolio Rebalancing Guide (879 lines), Tokenomics Guide (822 lines), Crypto Wallet Security Guide (755 lines).
CONTENT VOLUME: 30,404 lines across 42 learn page.tsx files (up from 26,849 — +3,555 lines, +13.2%). Strongest single-cycle growth today. Average page size: 724 lines.
PUBLISH QUEUE: Emptied this cycle — Euler V2, Hyperlane, Staking, Flash Loans promoted to PUBLISHED_PAGES. 4 new guides (BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Rebalancing) not yet queued.
DESIGN POLISH: UX audit completed on 4 guides (Euler V2, Hyperlane, Tokenomics, Rebalancing) — fixed OG images, domain mismatches, aria-labels, keyboard focus states, touch targets.
UNCOMMITTED FILES: cryptodegen 88 files (up from 80 in v5, +10%). Degen0x workspace has no git repo — all 42 learn pages exist only as local files.
SEO PIPELINE: All new pages confirmed with Metadata exports, Article+FAQPage structured data, comparison tables, and data page entries. No GSC or Vercel Analytics accessible from sandbox.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE ACTIVITY: 4 agents ran since last standup — build-v8, design, eod-v4, publish. Today's total: 17 reports (6 standups, 4 builds, 2 community, 1 design, 4 EODs, 1 publish). Highest daily throughput yet.

COMPLETED SINCE LAST STANDUP: (1) Build-v8 created Tokenomics + Portfolio Rebalancing guides. (2) Design polished 4 guides with UX/a11y fixes. (3) Publish promoted 4 pages from queue → PUBLISHED_PAGES. (4) EOD-v4 confirmed stable TS errors at 141.

P0 BLOCKER (Day 11, PERSISTENT): No production deploy since commit 3b2dd28 (Apr 1). 42 learn guides + all accumulated changes exist only locally. 88 uncommitted files in cryptodegen. Content stockpile at record size — deploy ROI increasing every cycle.
P1 — NEW CONTENT UNQUEUED: 4 new guides from this cycle (BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, Rebalancing) need adding to PUBLISH_QUEUE. Previous 4 were just promoted — queue is empty.
P2 — CONTENT VELOCITY: 4 pages/cycle is the highest rate today. At this pace, learn section could hit 50+ pages by end of day if builds continue.
P3 — CONTENT CALENDAR: 334 tweets drafted through Jul 5 (unchanged). Newsletter v19 ready. Social cards created for AI Tokens Breakout + CLARITY Act.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY AUTHORIZATION (P0, CRITICAL, Day 11): 42 learn guides, 88 uncommitted files, 334 tweet drafts, empty publish queue with 4 new pages ready to refill it — all stuck locally. The content-to-deploy ratio is the worst it's been. A single git commit+push remains the highest-ROI action by an order of magnitude. Every hour of delay is ~724 lines of content generating zero organic impressions.

PRIORITY 2 — REFILL PUBLISH QUEUE: Queue was just emptied (good!). Next build cycle should add BTCfi, Wallet Security, Tokenomics, and Portfolio Rebalancing to PUBLISH_QUEUE. These are high-value topics: BTCfi (emerging narrative), Wallet Security (evergreen + high search volume), Tokenomics (fundamental education), Rebalancing (practical tool-adjacent).

PRIORITY 3 — SHIFT FROM CONTENT CREATION TO DEPLOYMENT PREP: With 42 learn guides on disk and the queue cycling properly, the bottleneck is not content — it's shipping. Next cycles should prioritize: (a) committing all accumulated changes, (b) verifying build passes, (c) resolving the 141 TS errors in the 4 known files, (d) pushing to production.
